title: Add update button to flight log form

requirements.summary: Add an 'Update' button to the flight log form that appears when editing an existing flight log entry, saves changes to the backend, and closes the edit dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Update button is visible in the form when editing a flight log entry
Button is positioned at the specified XPath location alongside the existing submit button
Clicking the update button calls the updateFlightLog mutation with the modified data
Button shows loading state during the update operation
Form closes and flight logs table refreshes after successful update

file_operations.description: Add conditional rendering for an 'Update' button that appears when the form is in edit mode (editingLog prop is provided). Position this button as the second button in the form's button container at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[2]/button[2]. The Update button should call the updateFlightLog mutation from useFlightLogs hook with the current form values including the editingLog id, show a loading state during the operation using the mutation's isPending status, display a success toast notification upon completion, and trigger the onSuccess callback to close the dialog and refresh the flight logs table. Ensure the button is styled consistently with the existing submit button using shadcn-ui Button component.

requirements.summary: Ensure the date input field maintains its current functionality during edit mode, allowing users to modify the date value using the calendar picker
acceptanceCriteria: Date input field is editable when the form is in edit mode
Calendar picker opens when clicking the date field
Selected date from calendar updates the input value
Date field validation continues to work correctly

file_operations.description: Verify that the date input field at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/form[1]/div[1]/div[1]/input[1] is not disabled when the form is in edit mode. Ensure the calendar picker functionality remains active, the value binding correctly updates when a new date is selected, and all existing validation rules continue to apply during edit operations. No structural changes should be needed if the field is already properly implemented with controlled input and calendar picker integration.

requirements.summary: Verify that the close button properly cancels the edit operation and closes the form dialog without saving changes
acceptanceCriteria: Close button is visible and clickable in the dialog
Clicking close button cancels the edit operation
Form dialog closes without persisting any changes
No backend mutation is triggered when closing without update

file_operations.description: Verify that the close button at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/button[1] (likely part of the parent dialog component) properly calls the onCancel or dialog close handler without triggering any mutations. Ensure the form state is reset when closing in edit mode, preventing any unsaved changes from persisting. Review the dialog wrapper (likely in App.tsx where the FlightLogForm is used) to confirm the close button behavior is correctly wired to close the dialog and clear the editingLog state.

Verify that the dialog containing FlightLogForm has a proper close button that clears the editingLog state variable without triggering any save operations. Ensure clicking the close button or dialog overlay dismisses the dialog and resets the form to its initial state, ready for the next create or edit operation.
